name: LeadFlow AI — Intelligent Lead Capture & Enrichment
description: A turnkey AI lead generation engine that captures prospect data, enriches it with business intelligence via external APIs, and delivers sales-ready leads directly to your spreadsheet — eliminating hours of manual research and ensuring your pipeline stays full.
keyFeatures: AI-powered data enrichment with business context
Seamless CRM and Google Sheets integration
Third-party API orchestration for company intel
End-to-end workflow with zero manual intervention

name: ConversaAI — Voice-Enabled Conversational Assistant
description: A production-ready conversational AI assistant that delivers instant, intelligent responses in both text and natural-sounding audio. Ideal for customer support portals, internal helpdesks, and voice-first user experiences — deployable via webhook with no frontend changes required.
keyFeatures: Real-time conversational AI with sub-second responses
Google Gemini LLM for context-aware answers
result: Real-time AI chat with voice output

name: ScheduleIQ — AI Calendar & Availability Manager
description: An intelligent scheduling assistant that lets teams query calendars using plain English. Ask "Am I free Thursday afternoon?" or "Show next week's meetings" and get instant, accurate answers — with conversational memory that understands follow-up questions in context.
keyFeatures: Smart tool selection for events & availability
Instant event summaries with direct links

name: MailPilot AI — Smart Email Dispatch Agent
description: A hands-free email agent that sends professionally structured emails from a single natural language command. Say "Email the client about the project update" — the AI drafts the content, fills in recipients and subject lines, and dispatches instantly via Gmail. Perfect for sales teams, support desks, and workflow triggers.
keyFeatures: AI-powered recipient, subject, and body extraction

name: VoiceCraft AI — Intelligent Text-to-Speech Engine
description: A plug-and-play voice engine that transforms AI-generated responses into studio-quality speech in real time. Powered by Deepgram's TTS API and an LLM backend, it's built for IVR systems, accessibility features, voice bots, and any product that needs a human-like voice layer.

name: Intermost — MBBS Study Abroad Consultancy Platform
description: A comprehensive digital platform for an MBBS study abroad consultancy, helping aspiring medical students explore university options, compare countries, and connect with counselors. Designed to build trust, generate qualified leads, and streamline the entire admissions journey — live at intermost.in & intermost.eu.
keyFeatures: Lead capture and counselor booking system

name: AccessMails — Professional Business Solutions Website
description: A polished corporate website built to establish brand authority, showcase service offerings, and drive client inquiries. Featuring a modern design, responsive layout, and conversion-optimized pages — engineered to turn visitors into business opportunities. Live at accessmails.in.

name: RyRaah — Premium Women's Jewelry E-Commerce Store
description: A stunning e-commerce platform for a women's jewelry brand, designed to showcase collections with high-quality visuals, seamless product browsing, and a smooth checkout experience. Built to captivate shoppers and convert interest into sales. Live at ryraah.in.
keyFeatures: Visually rich jewelry catalog with zoom & detail views
Product filtering by category, price, and style

name: Ombase — Corporate Business & Services Website
description: A clean, professional business website crafted to communicate brand value, highlight core services, and generate leads. With a focus on clarity and credibility, it positions the company as a trusted partner for prospective clients. Live at ombase.in.
keyFeatures: Contact forms and lead capture integrations

name: KrishnaKala — Online Plant Store & Nursery
description: A vibrant e-commerce platform for a plant nursery, making it effortless for customers to browse, select, and order plants online. Featuring rich product imagery, care guides, and a seamless checkout — designed to bring the nursery experience to every doorstep. Live at krishnakala.in.
keyFeatures: Curated plant catalog with detailed care guides

name: Nikam Interior — Immersive Design Studio Platform
description: A premium digital experience for an interior design studio, featuring interactive 3D room previews, an online portfolio showcase, and integrated appointment booking — designed to convert visitors into clients.

name: WeatherIQ — Real-Time Conversational Weather Platform
description: A conversational weather intelligence platform that lets users ask for forecasts in plain English and receive real-time, location-specific updates. Powered by Google Gemini and Open-Meteo, it's ideal for logistics dashboards, travel apps, or any product needing weather-aware decision-making.

name: ToolChain AI — Multi-Tool Conversational Agent
description: A self-hosted AI assistant that goes beyond chat — it calls live tools to fetch weather, search YouTube, pull news headlines, and more. Powered by a local LLaMA model with Model Context Protocol (MCP), it keeps data private while delivering real-time, actionable intelligence.
result: AI assistant with live tool-calling capabilities

name: DocuQuery AI — Intelligent Document Q&A Assistant
description: An enterprise-ready document intelligence tool that lets users upload PDFs and get precise, citation-backed answers instantly. Combines FAISS vector search with Google Gemini's generative AI to deliver answers grounded in your actual documents — ideal for legal, compliance, HR, and knowledge management teams.
keyFeatures: Bulk PDF upload and intelligent indexing
RAG-powered retrieval with FAISS vector search
Gemini AI for contextually grounded answers
Works across any document type or domain
result: Instant context-aware answers from any PDF

name: VisionTrack — Real-Time Object Detection & Gesture Control
description: A computer vision suite featuring real-time vehicle counting for traffic management and a touchless gesture-controlled interface. Powered by YOLOv11 and Mediapipe, these solutions are built for smart city infrastructure, warehouse automation, and accessibility-first product design.
keyFeatures: Real-time vehicle detection and directional counting
Live video stream processing at scale
result: Real-time object detection and gesture control

name: PartVision AI — Industrial Component Recognition System
description: An industrial-grade visual recognition system that identifies machine parts from photos and maps them to 3D CAD models in seconds. Purpose-built for equipment maintenance teams, it eliminates manual part lookups, reduces downtime, and streamlines procurement workflows.
keyFeatures: Instant part identification from real-world images
3D CAD model to physical component mapping
Scalable cloud storage with vector search
result: Automated part discovery for maintenance workflows

name: InsightAgent — AI-Powered Business Analytics Platform
description: An agentic analytics platform that turns raw operational data into executive-ready insights. Upload spreadsheets or connect databases — the AI autonomously identifies performance gaps, surfaces hidden trends, and delivers actionable recommendations through a conversational interface.
keyFeatures: Hybrid SQL + vector routing for complex queries
Excel, CSV, and structured dataset support
result: Automated business intelligence from raw data

name: TrainBot AI — Automated Employee Onboarding Agent
description: An AI training agent that onboards new employees by autonomously navigating enterprise software and narrating each step with voice guidance. Reduces trainer dependency, cuts onboarding time in half, and ensures consistent training quality across the organization.
keyFeatures: Real-time voice narration via speech synthesis

name: VidGen Studio — AI Video Creation Platform
description: A scalable video generation platform that empowers marketing teams and content creators to produce AI-generated videos on demand. With intelligent queue management and Sora API integration, it handles high-volume production without compromising quality or speed.

name: FormFlow AI — Autonomous Form Automation Agent
description: A production-grade automation agent that fills complex web forms from plain-English instructions. The AI understands form layouts, selects the right fields, and submits data autonomously — eliminating repetitive data entry for operations, HR, and back-office teams.
keyFeatures: Autonomous form field detection and filling
result: Zero-effort form automation via natural language
